description_long: This is a stylized doll with a large, rounded head and expressive green eyes, featuring a friendly, animated face. The doll has light brown hair styled in two low pigtails and wears a pastel pink and white outfit consisting of a short-sleeved shirt with suspenders and knee-length pants. One leg is bent backward, and one arm is raised, giving the impression of a playful or dynamic pose. The doll's left leg and right arm are decorated with green and white patterns, adding visual interest to the design. The surface appears matte and slightly soft, typical of vinyl or rubber dolls. The overall look is whimsical and childlike, suitable for play or display in urban parks, playgrounds, or residential settings.
description: A stylized, playful doll with brown pigtails, green eyes, and a pastel pink and white outfit, posed dynamically with one arm raised and one leg bent. Decorative green and white patterns accent the limbs, and the surface appears matte and soft.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's expressive face, raised right arm, and bent left leg, with clear visibility of the pink and white outfit and green eye color.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the head, the backward-bent left leg, and the arm positions, with the pigtails and outfit details visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, pigtails, and the striped pattern on the back of the outfit, as well as the bent leg and arm positions.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the doll's profile, the forward arm, and the backward-bent leg, with clear visibility of the green and white leg decoration.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll wears a pastel pink and white short-sleeved shirt with suspenders, matching knee-length pants, and green and white decorative patterns on the left leg and right arm. The style is playful and reminiscent of children's casual wear, with a whimsical, animated influence.
attribute_pose: The doll stands on its right leg with the left leg bent backward at the knee, the right arm raised above the head, and the left arm extended forward. The head faces forward, and the torso is upright, suggesting a dynamic, playful motion.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a friendly, smiling expression with wide green eyes, slightly raised eyebrows, and a small, closed mouth conveying a cheerful demeanor.
attribute_hair_style: Medium-length, straight light brown hair styled in two low pigtails with a center part.
